title: Forge Of The Ancients
description: This mod adds weapons and armors with unique abilities
body:
Forge of the Ancients: Harness the Power of Legendary Weapons with Unique Abilities

 

Are you ready to wield weapons forged in the depths of forgotten realms? Forge of the Ancients adds a selection of powerful and visually striking weapons to your Minecraft world, each imbued with unique abilities to give you the edge in combat.

Weapons included:

  • Heavenly Sword - Negates Fall damage when held, grants extra hearts and slow falling when right-click
  • Bleeding Katana - Has 25% chance to heal on hit
  • Toxic Cutlass - Right-click to emit a toxic explosion, poison enemies on hit
  • Ice Blade - Chance to freeze enemies
  • Sculk Blade - Right-click to unleash its dark power
  • Hell Sword - Right-click ot unleash fiery warth, sets enemies on fire when hit
  • Storm Rapier - Right-click to call down lightning
  • Dark Sword - Right-click to teleport and give enemies wither effect
  • Eternal Blade - Dash forward with incredible speed, giving enemies wither effect and burning them

Weapons included:

  • Demon Lord Armor - full set gives player damage boost and fire resistance
  • Heavenly Guardian Armor - full set gives player plus three hearts that regenarates after 35 seconds

Recommended Mods for the Best Experience

To further enhance your experience with Forge of the Ancients, I recommend using it alongside the Better Combat mod.

Future Plans

The journey doesn't end here! I'm committed to bringing even more content to Forge of the Ancients. Here’s what you can look forward to in future updates:

  • More weapons – Expect even more weapons with distinct abilities.
  • Mobs – Encounter new hostile mobs designed to test your strength with these new weapons.
  • Dungeons – Explore challenging dungeons filled with rare loot.
  • Armors – Equip powerful new armor sets to protect yourself and amplify the abilities of the ancient weapons.
  • Tools – Gain access to new tools that will aid in resource gathering and crafting.
  • Bug fixes – I'll work to resolve all known issues.
  • Better visuals – Expect improved visual effects for the weapons and abilities.
